data.title: Bitdeer announces $400M funding, moving on from Ohio facility fire
data.description:
A few days after a fire gutted Bitdeer’s under-construction Bitcoin mining facility in Massillon, Ohio, Bitdeer Technologies Group has announced the pricing of a $400 million private placement of convertible senior notes due in 2031. It is offering the placement to qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A. Net proceeds are estimated at approximately $388 million, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitdeer-announces-400m-funding/

data.title: BNY launches money market fund to hold reserves for US stablecoin issuers
data.description:
Built to align with the GENIUS Act, the new fund provides a regulated vehicle for holding stablecoin reserves in cash and US Treasurys.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bny-stablecoin-reserves-fund-to-support-regulated-us-issuers?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3F_dc%3D1763061622613%26noCache%3Dtrue%26_ts%3D1763061622613&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Analyst Benjamin Cowen Warns Ethereum’s ‘Good Run’ Hinges on Bitcoin Holding Above Crucial Bull Market Indicator
data.description:
Market analyst Benjamin Cowen says Ethereum’s (ETH) ability to extend its recent gains depends on whether Bitcoin (BTC) can remain above a key technical level that defines broader market momentum.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/11/13/analyst-benjamin-cowen-warns-ethereums-good-run-hinges-on-bitcoin-holding-above-crucial-bull-market-indicator/

data.title: Shein and Temu to face EU customs duties as de minimis exemption removed
data.description:
Finance officials from European Union countries made a deal Thursday to start charging customs fees on cheap imported packages two years sooner than expected. The target? Chinese shopping sites Shein and Temu. Ministers meeting in Brussels want the new tax rules ready by 2026. The European Parliament still has to sign off on it first. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/shein-and-temu-to-face-eu-customs-duties/

data.title: European Officials Consider Alternative to Federal Reserve's Dollar Support Mechanism
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, European financial stability officials are discussing the possibility of creating an alternative mechanism to the Federal Reserve's dollar support system, aiming to consolidate the dollars held by central banks outside the United States. Under the leadership of U.S. President Donald Trump, these central banks are seeking to reduce their reliance on the U.S.

The Federal Reserve's mechanism provides dollar loans to other central banks, serving as a lifeline during periods of market stress to ensure global financial stability. Interviews with over a dozen European central bank and regulatory officials reveal concerns that these mechanisms could be "weaponized" by the Trump administration.

European officials' concerns heightened around April but later eased following assurances from the Federal Reserve. However, the practical challenges of consolidating dollars make the approach potentially unfeasible. A White House spokesperson stated that President Trump has "repeatedly reaffirmed his commitment to maintaining the strength and influence of the dollar."
